title: 菊花賞の後に・虚ろなる焔

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Yaeno Muteki is in the lead! And she's won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I... won...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki enters the runners' tunnel to
celebrate her victory, but halfway through, she
suddenly stops and stands in place.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Congrats on winning the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But... I...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I may have won today's race...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But... I cannot be satisfied with my performance!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Huh?! Her presence is looming even larger! It
feels strong enough to block out the sky itself!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I have to fight back! Come on, blaze! Burn!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Burn!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Defeat is not an option! Win! I must... win!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Why?! Why won't the flames light?!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How... how can anyone be so unsightly?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It would be one thing if my raging flames were
toying with me... but to finish without igniting
them at all?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What a shameful performance!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm unworthy of wearing the chrysanthemum
crown! Not after embarrassing myself like that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why?! Why couldn't I make the flames rage?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like the long distance of the Kikuka Sho
was pretty hard on her. Winning in spite of that
was an incredible feat, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than feeling happy that she won, Yaeno
Muteki seems to harbor some deep anguish over
her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, Yaeno Muteki was not
especially motivated to face Super Creek. That
might explain it.
choice_data_list:
Do you think it's because Ardan and Chiyono O
weren't there?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals, the ones who stoke her fierce blaze,
were nowhere to be found. Until now, Yaeno
Muteki has always been driven by a powerful
desire to defeat the pair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without them here driving her today, that
passionate desire for victory was gone.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My desire to defeat Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro
Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaahhh!
Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if my legs shatter! I will burn out my
very lifeforce! And that light will serve as proof
that I was alive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, no, nooo! The Derby's mine! It's
miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(...No! Losing is not an option. I will not...
abiiide... defeeeat!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was your incredible passion that drew today's
performance out of me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to be outdone... I wanted to light my
soul ablaze and burn just as brightly as you two.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's true... My desire to defeat Chiyono O and
Ardan is what set my heart aflame.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Their incredible obsession with the Derby pulled
me along in their wake...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Obsession.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is not the word I would use to describe what
I felt today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Yaeno Muteki certainly wasn't
hellbent on winning today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is driven by her desire to race
toe-to-toe with her role model, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan runs desperately, prepared to
sacrifice her very life in order to leave behind
proof of her existence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both have goals they obsess over, and that
in turn pushes them towards victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It goes beyond simply wanting to win. Their
obsessions won't let them yield to anyone, and in
the end, that becomes the decisive factor
towards victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An obsession like that is not something that can
be given. Yaeno Muteki must find this spark
within herself to be able to ignite the blaze.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't simply rely on Chiyono O and Mejiro
Ardan. I must find my own obsession...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
choice_data_list:
But you can take your time. You'll still get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that obsession provides an extra
edge, but even a mild desire is enough for victory
as long as she has the physical ability.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. Let's continue training as we have
been.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if she'll ever find an obsession of her
own, but I have to leave that to her. All I can do
is watch over her in the meantime.
choice_data_list: Now then, about our next goal...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...One moment, please.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Okay.
choice_data_list: I was thinking the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that, after seeing her performance
today, I feel medium-distance races may suit her
better than long-distance ones.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So that's why you've chosen the Osaka Hai, a
medium-distance spring G1.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have no objections. As long as it's a G1, I expect
I should be able to face worthy opponents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we settle on the Osaka Hai as our next
goal!
